## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees and provide an overview of GrowthX's onboarding process and company structure.](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires: Georgemaine (Design Engineer), Jo (Managing Editor), Ehtisham (Managing Editor)](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Week 1 focus: Complete company onboarding program via Notion and Linear tasks](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Key tools: Notion (handbook), Linear (project management), Slack (communication)](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Thursday: Strategy session with Marcel (CEO) - watch recordings beforehand](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Bridget: Operations lead (HR, finance, IT, legal, customer ops) based in Vancouver](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Cristina: Executive assistant for operations team, manages onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Georgemaine: Design engineer from Amsterdam, previously at Framer, Molly, and Pitch](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Jo: Managing editor from Lisbon, 5+ years SaaS experience, referred by Vivek](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Ehtisham: Managing editor from Karachi, 15 years content marketing experience, ex-Animalz](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Onboarding Process Overview

  - [Week 1: Focus on company onboarding program in Notion/Linear](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Day 1: Set up tools (Zoom, Fathom, Linear, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Key documents: Big Picture, How We Work, Marcel's pitch recordings](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [4-hour workshop recording crucial for understanding company history/purpose](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [HR policies: Unlimited PTO (communicate absences clearly), referral bonuses](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

### Company Structure

  - [Two main orgs: Deliver (D, customer-facing) and Build (B, internal)](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Pod structure for Deliver org, directors own book of accounts](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Onboarding buddy system: peer support during first few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Tools and Processes

  - [Notion: Company handbook and onboarding resources](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Linear: Project management, task tracking, and onboarding checklists](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Slack: Primary communication tool, channels prefixed with D or B](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Content Team Specific Onboarding

  - [Additional Linear project: "Deliver.org, first two weeks"](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Create onboarding journal to document learnings and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Simulation project: Create 1000-word calibration article for practice](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

  - [Content team: Await further instructions from Matthew (Chief Content Officer) and Andy (Customer Operations)](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Georgemaine: Connect with Tucker/Daniel about potential new roles](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [All: Prepare brief intro for next week's all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/8W5rCah-i-DogWFd62aePy_gsi8G_nbU?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
